regions.name: top_navigation
regions.notes: Top labels, icons, currency, and states remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: settings_tabs
regions.notes: Tab plate art can be generated, but labels and selected states remain live.

regions.name: settings_rows
regions.notes: Setting labels, dropdown values, toggle text, and selected states remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: settings_controls
regions.notes: Control plates may be generated, but the active/inactive values and interaction states remain runtime-owned.
